modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help setting up assigned iPad for work.

full_description_text:  
- So, I was chatting with someone who just got an iPad for their job in facilities.  
- They were really unsure about how to get it all set up and were asking a bunch of questions.  
- It seems like they just want to know the steps to make it work, but they didn’t have any tech background, which made it a bit tricky.  
- They mentioned they were using WebTMA, but that’s about all I got from them!
short_description: Need help setting up assigned iPad for work.
